original: This gentle flower with wavy pink petals emits a scent that reminds you of the lust-inducing pheromones of the female korgonne. One whiff of this is guaranteed to force any opponent to think about something else.\n\n40 lust damage.
You don’t have anyone to use this on right now.
{var0}+{var1}+" considers it unwise to waste the flower outside of combat.
context: <<POS:05904828>> <<VARS:var0=t.capitalA,var1=t.short>> output(t.capitalA+t.short+" considers it unwise to waste the flower outside of combat.\n")

original: {var1}.capitalize({var0})+" produces an Aphro Daisy and hucks it in your direction!
context: <<POS:05905555>> <<VARS:var0=t.getCombatName(),!1,var1=h.m>> output(h.m.capitalize(t.getCombatName(),!1)+" produces an Aphro Daisy and hucks it in your direction!")
